experiment_title: 铁钉生锈条件的探究实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="铁钉生锈条件的探究实验" goal="通过对比不同环境下铁钉的锈蚀情况，分析铁钉生锈所需的条件（空气、水、氧气）。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="iron_nail_1" type="iron_nail" />
      <Component id="iron_nail_2" type="iron_nail" />
      <Component id="iron_nail_3" type="iron_nail" />
      <Component id="test_tube_rack" type="rack" />
      <Component id="cotton" type="cotton" />
      <Component id="rubber_stop" type="rubber_stop" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="boiled_distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="vegetable_oil" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="calcium_chloride" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="iron_nail_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_2" />
      
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="iron_nail_2" vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="C57H104O6" volume="2 mL" id="step_5" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_6" />
      
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="CaCl2" mass="2 g" id="step_7" />
      <Insert tool="cotton" vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_8" />
      <Insert tool="iron_nail_3" vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stop" vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_10" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_3" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_11" />
      
      
      <Wait time="3d" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="observe and record rust formation on iron nails in each test tube" id="step_13" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装1号试管：加入蒸馏水，放入铁钉，置于试管架中，作为对照组。
组装2号试管：加入蒸馏水，放入铁钉，覆盖植物油，置于试管架中，用于隔绝空气。
组装3号试管：加入氯化钙，塞棉花，放入铁钉，塞橡皮塞，置于试管架中，用于隔绝水和空气。
静置三天，观察并记录各试管中铁钉的生锈情况，分析生锈条件。
